name: Hernandez v. Texas
question: Is it a denial of the Fourteenth Amendment equal protection clause to try a defendant of a particular race or ethnicity before a jury where all persons of his race or ancestry have, because of that race or ethnicity, been excluded by the state?
description: A case in which the Court found that intentionally excluding Mexicans from a jury in a trial where the defendant was a Mexican was a violation of the Equal Protection Clause of the Fourteenth Amendment.
